title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at MCX are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MCX:
MCX is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX!
